market.summary: Startup graph and diligence software for universities, accelerators, and seed investors that need to discover spinouts earlier, resolve messy entity data, and track commercialization signals in one place.
market.whyNow: University ecosystem teams are buying better startup intelligence, and spinout commercialization is getting more structured support and funding.
market.wedge: Start with one region or university system, then expand into alerts, entity resolution, relationship maps, and diligence workspaces.

competitors.name: Harmonic
competitors.positioning: Startup intelligence and relationship graph software with ecosystem data and prospecting workflows.

competitors.name: PitchBook
competitors.positioning: Broad private-market data platform used for company discovery, diligence, and investor research.

competitors.name: Crunchbase
competitors.positioning: Startup database and prospecting tool with funding, people, and company tracking.

competitors.name: Dealroom
competitors.positioning: Ecosystem intelligence platform focused on startup landscapes, innovation hubs, and market maps.

competitors.name: Tracxn
competitors.positioning: Private-market discovery and monitoring platform for startups, investors, and corporates.

sources.title: The Polsky Center Partners with Harmonic to Expand Data and Insights on Startup Ecosystem
sources.note: Direct signal that universities want deeper startup intelligence.

sources.title: New Waterloo quantum startup gains fast momentum with $10.7 million in funding
sources.note: Shows continued spinout formation and commercialization potential.

sources.note: Direct competitor for startup intelligence and prospecting.
